w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Result-driven HR Manager with 10 years of comprehensive experience in managing end-to-end recruitment, HR operations, and employee lifecycle management across healthcare, education, IT, and non-IT sectors. Proven ability to handle leadership hiring as well as bulk recruitment, ensuring timely closure of positions while maintaining quality standards. Experienced in managing a workforce of 1,000+ employees and leading cross-functional teams. Skilled in stakeholder management, HR compliance, employee engagement, and workforce planning.
Taleo · Zoho Recruit · Keka · Google Sheets · Slack
Leading HR function across healthcare, education & corporate environments. Part of NABH hospital accreditation team.
Managing full-cycle recruitment from requirement gathering to onboarding across Healthcare, Education, IT & Non-IT roles
Handling leadership hiring: Chief Medical Officer and senior academic roles
, General Physician), nurses, and clinical/non-clinical staff
Managing hiring for BDS & MDS faculty for dental college
Recruitment for MBA, BBA, MCA, BCA faculty, Professors, Associate & Guest Faculty
Managing school hiring: PGT/TGT teachers, school nurses, yoga trainers, administrative staff
Overseeing HR operations for 1,000+ employee headcount across multiple locations
Leading 6 cross-functional teams: HODs, Finance, Admin, Facility, IT Support, Civil
Managing onboarding, employee engagement, and exit management processes
Coordinating with leadership for workforce planning and organizational development
Managed end-to-end recruitment lifecycle: sourcing, screening, interviewing, and onboarding
Coordinated with department heads to understand hiring needs and deliver suitable candidates
Handled employee engagement activities to improve morale and retention
Managed payroll coordination, compliance, and HR documentation
Addressed employee grievances and ensured smooth employee relations
Supported performance management and appraisal processes
Coordinated recruitment processes across multiple franchise locations
Managed HR documentation and employee records
Ensured compliance with HR policies and procedures
Managed joining formalities, ID cards, and appointment letters
Acted as bridge between management and employees
Assisted in recruitment and onboarding processes
Supported HR operations and administrative tasks
Supported HR operations and policy implementation
